_meta.keyKnowledge: We design and improve the user interface of a digital system, then share, discuss and evaluate our designs.

_source.w: We design and improve the user interface of a digital system, then share, discuss and evaluate our designs.
y: Great user interface design makes technology accessible, intuitive and enjoyable to use.
Iterating on designs based on feedback is how professional designers work.
Understanding user experience helps us create technology that truly serves people's needs.
eg: We design a user interface for an app, considering layout, navigation and visual hierarchy.
We modify our design based on user testing — watching how people interact with our prototype.
We evaluate our design against usability principles — is it easy to learn and use?
We compare our interface designs with classmates and discuss what works best.
We consider accessibility — can people with different abilities use our design?
We create wireframes or mockups to communicate our design ideas clearly.
